name: proof-closeout
description: Reusable proof, verification, adoption-readiness, and handoff skills for Codex closeout.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-backed completion, verification, and handoff checks.
interface.longDescription: Packages closeout skills that map changed surfaces to verification evidence, review adoption readiness, prevent false completion, and generate durable handoffs.
defaultPrompt: Check whether this change is really done.
Create a handoff for this unfinished task.
Map changed files to verification evidence.
